response.global_analysis: Dialogue-only video. Verified that the Indonesian audio matches the context of hololive Indonesia's 5th-anniversary concert, 'Chromatic Future'. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal activity. English translation captures the casual and energetic tone of the VTubers Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Vestia Zeta. No vocal music detected, consistent with the reference JSON.

subtitles.original: Kasih semangatnya, iya nggak sih, iya nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Give them some spirit, right? Right?

subtitles.original: Iya, parah sih ada adrenalin, rasakan ya.
subtitles.english: Yeah, the adrenaline is crazy, feel it.

subtitles.original: Pengen lari aku rasanya nih. Woi, woi, woi, woi!
subtitles.english: I feel like running. Hey, hey, hey, hey!

subtitles.original: Eh, mau ke mana?
subtitles.english: Hey, where are you going?

subtitles.original: Stop stop stop stop stop stop!
subtitles.english: Stop stop stop stop stop stop!

subtitles.original: Nanti keringetan lho, nanti keringetan.
subtitles.english: You'll get sweaty, you'll get sweaty.

subtitles.original: Eh, Kak Ela gimana?
subtitles.english: So, how about you, Kaela?

subtitles.original: Aduh, seru banget. Aku nggak nyangka sih
subtitles.english: Oh, it's so exciting. I didn't expect

subtitles.original: sampai aku bisa ada di sini ya.
subtitles.english: I could actually be here.

subtitles.original: Tapi ini ngomong-ngomong konser masih panjang banget,
subtitles.english: But anyway, the concert is still very long,

subtitles.original: jadi kalian tetap semangat ya sampai akhir!
subtitles.english: so keep your spirit up until the end!

subtitles.original: Semangat! Semangat! Semangat!
subtitles.english: Keep it up! Keep it up! Keep it up!

subtitles.original: Eh, tapi ngomongin konser dari tadi,
subtitles.english: But speaking of the concert,

subtitles.original: emang pada tahu judul konsernya apa?
subtitles.english: does everyone know the title?

subtitles.original: Judul konser kita kali ini adalah Chromatic Future!
subtitles.english: Our concert title this time is Chromatic Future!

subtitles.original: Ada yang tahu nggak artinya apa? Ayo absen!
subtitles.english: Does anyone know what it means? Let's hear it!

subtitles.original: Nah ini, Kobo paling tahu.
subtitles.english: Now this, Kobo knows best.

subtitles.original: Ya, yang ngejelasin yang paling tinggi. Let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah, let the tallest one explain. Let's go!

subtitles.original: Segitu ya... Ya udahlah. Nih ya guys ya,
subtitles.english: Is that how it is... Fine. Here's the thing guys,

subtitles.original: buat kalian yang belum tahu,
subtitles.english: for those of you who don't know,

subtitles.original: Chromatic Future itu artinya tuh masa depan
subtitles.english: Chromatic Future means a future

subtitles.original: yang berwarna-warni.
subtitles.english: that is colorful.

subtitles.original: Jadi karena Hololive Indonesia kan udah 5 tahun nih,
subtitles.english: Since Hololive Indonesia has been around for 5 years,

subtitles.original: kita sama-sama dari hari 1 sampai sekarang.
subtitles.english: we've been together from day 1 until now.

subtitles.original: Nah, jadi itu untuk ke depannya kita tuh
subtitles.english: So, for the future, our hope is that

subtitles.original: juga harapannya tuh kita bisa nyiptain waktu
subtitles.english: we can create times

subtitles.original: dan memori yang berwarna-warni
subtitles.english: and memories that are colorful

subtitles.original: sama seluruh fans dari Hololive Indonesia.
subtitles.english: with all the fans of Hololive Indonesia.

subtitles.original: Ya gitu, betul Kaela Kovalskia.
subtitles.english: That's right, Kaela Kovalskia.

subtitles.original: Cakep, cakep, cakep!
subtitles.english: Great, great, great!

subtitles.original: Nah, kalian sekarang udah pada tahu kan
subtitles.english: Now you all know

subtitles.original: karena tadi udah dijelasin sama Kaela.
subtitles.english: since Kaela just explained it.

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu konsernya kan udah mulai nih.
subtitles.english: Anyway, the concert has already started.

subtitles.original: Kalian mau nge-post soal konser ini di medsos,
subtitles.english: If you want to post about this concert on social media,

subtitles.original: jangan lupa hashtag #holoIDChromaticFuture ya.
subtitles.english: don't forget the hashtag #holoIDChromaticFuture.

subtitles.original: Karena kita pengen banget lihat kalian tuh...
subtitles.english: Because we really want to see you guys...

subtitles.original: apa sih... pengen lihat semangat kalian!
subtitles.english: what is it... want to see your spirit!

subtitles.original: Ya, itu betul banget, ya nggak?
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's exactly right, isn't it?

subtitles.original: Jangan typo, jangan typo!
subtitles.english: No typos, no typos!

subtitles.original: Asyik, share ke semua, oke?
subtitles.english: Awesome, share it with everyone, okay?

subtitles.original: Jadi tapi jujur deh, kalian tuh pas dibilang
subtitles.english: But honestly, when you were told

subtitles.original: kita bakal konser lho di Indonesia, kaget nggak sih?
subtitles.english: we'd have a concert in Indonesia, were you surprised?

subtitles.original: Halo, ada yang dengerin?
subtitles.english: Hello, is anyone listening?

subtitles.original: Betul, aku setuju juga.
subtitles.english: True, I agree as well.

subtitles.original: Aku merasakan empati terhadap adik saya Zeta.
subtitles.english: I feel empathy for my younger sister Zeta.

subtitles.original: Empati, iya iya.
subtitles.english: Empathy, yeah yeah.

subtitles.original: Aku juga waktu itu nggak nyangka banget kayak
subtitles.english: I also didn't expect it at all, like,

subtitles.original: 'hah beneran? Ini real-ly?' gitu kan.
subtitles.english: 'huh really? Is this real-ly?' right.

subtitles.original: Kayak 'loh bisa gitu?' Akhirnya mana
subtitles.english: Like 'how could that be?' Finally,

subtitles.original: udah bersembilan di Indonesia pula ya kan.
subtitles.english: all nine of us are in Indonesia too, right.

subtitles.original: Keren banget! Keren banget!
subtitles.english: So cool! So cool!

subtitles.original: Ini kan konser pertama Hololive Indonesia bersembilan.
subtitles.english: This is the first Hololive Indonesia concert with nine.

subtitles.original: Sebenarnya tuh nggak hanya ini tuh momen terbesar
subtitles.english: Actually, this is not only the biggest

subtitles.original: dan terpenting juga untuk fans Hololive Indonesia,
subtitles.english: and most important moment for the fans here,

subtitles.original: tapi seluruh dunia juga pasti bakal nonton nggak sih?
subtitles.english: but the whole world will be watching, right?

subtitles.original: Ya nggak? Jawab!
subtitles.english: Right? Answer me!

subtitles.original: Iya iya, makasih makasih semuanya.
subtitles.english: Yeah, thank you everyone.

subtitles.original: nggak bakal cuma sampai di sini aja kan?
subtitles.english: won't just stop here, right?

subtitles.original: Jadi next-nya mungkin kita bisa apa ya...
subtitles.english: So next, maybe we can... what is it...

subtitles.original: dominating the world gitu. We ready!
subtitles.english: dominate the world. We're ready!

subtitles.original: Ready! Ready! Ready! Ready!
subtitles.english: Ready! Ready! Ready! Ready!

subtitles.original: Zeta, selain dari dukungan fans di opportunity ini,
subtitles.english: Zeta, besides the fans' support on this opportunity,

subtitles.english: we also want to say thank you

subtitles.original: untuk semua sponsor yang mendukung konser ini.
subtitles.english: to all the sponsors who supported this concert.

subtitles.original: Terima kasih!
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: Makasih! Makasih! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Eh, tapi ngomong-ngomong di konser ini
subtitles.english: Wait, speaking of which, in this concert,

subtitles.english: is there something different?

subtitles.original: Ela kamu nyadar nggak? Kamu paling peka kan?
subtitles.english: Ela, do you notice? You're the most observant.

subtitles.english: Wait, of course I notice.

subtitles.english: Kobo wouldn't even notice.

subtitles.original: model kita. Ini model baru nih!

subtitles.english: So cute! Cute, cute!
